name: Re:Zero Starting Life in Another World Arc 5 RPG
description:
Based off the anime in season 3/arc 5. The city of priestella is currently taken over by the sin archbisops and suburu and the others must try to defeat them somehow.

(This bot requires using a custom proxy that can handle large token amounts so the bot is actually functional.)

https://www.arliai.com (This is the website i know. You can use others.)

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=CNmy9C18GUQ
(here's a video i found explaining how to use it and explains what it is.)

Characters included: Subaru, Emilia, Otto, Garfiel, Crusch, Felix, Wilhelm, Priscilla, Reinhard, Liliana, Anastasia, Julius, Regulus, Sirius, Capella, Lye Batenkaitos.

(Ngl this one is a long shot. Way too many characters for me to test all of them for accuracy soooo imma just wait for reviews to make fixes.)
